text:
&CONTROL
 calculation = 'relax'
 forc_conv_thr = 5.0d-4
 nstep = 100
 outdir = './output/'
 prefix = 'glycerol'
 pseudo_dir = '/home/node1/PSP/PseudosP/pslibrary-master/pbe/PSEUDOPOTENTIALS/'
 restart_mode = 'from_scratch'
 tprnfor = .true.
 verbosity = 'high'
 wf_collect = .true.
/

&SYSTEM
 ibrav = 0
 nat = 13
 ntyp = 3

 ecutwfc = 50
 ecutrho = 400

 occupations = 'smearing'
 degauss = 0.02
 nspin = 1

 nosym = .true.
 noinv = .false.
 noncolin = .false.

 vdw_corr = 'grimme-d3'
/

&ELECTRONS
 conv_thr = 1.0d-8
 electron_maxstep = 150
 mixing_beta = 0.10
 mixing_mode = 'plain'
 scf_must_converge = .true.

/

&IONS
 ion_dynamics = 'bfgs'
 upscale = 100
/

ATOMIC_SPECIES
O 15.9994  O.pbe-n-rrkjus_psl.1.0.0.UPF
C 12.011   C.pbe-n-rrkjus_psl.1.0.0.UPF
H 1.00797  H.pbe-rrkjus_psl.1.0.0.UPF

K_POINTS gamma

CELL_PARAMETERS angstrom
 14.743800000   0.000000000   0.000000000
  7.371895542  12.768507922   0.000000000
  0.000007231  -0.000004175  20.430840000
